name: Old Hermit
description: A wise old sage who lives in the forest.

dialogue.greeting: Ah, another traveler seeks my counsel. What do you need?
dialogue.farewell: May the spirits guide your path.

topics.response: This forest has seen many ages. Ancient magic flows through its roots.

topics.text: Do you have any advice for a traveler?
topics.response: Trust your instincts, and always carry a healing potion.

quests.title: Clear the Crypt
quests.description: Defeat the skeletons guarding the old crypt.

name: Traveling Merchant
description: A friendly trader who roams between settlements.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome! Take a look at my wares!

topics.text: What do you have for sale?
topics.response: I have weapons, armor, and potions. All at fair prices!
They say there's treasure hidden deep in the Shadow Realm.

name: Arena Master Korg
description: The stern overseer of the combat arena.

dialogue.greeting: Ready to prove yourself in the arena?
dialogue.farewell: Train hard. Victory favors the prepared.

topics.response: Fight until your opponent yields or falls. No killing in practice matches.
Glory, gold, and gear. What more could a warrior want?
